title: My First Post Ever
excerpt: I have absolute no idea why I'm doing this.
content:
I never had a blog before so be welcome to my first one and also to my first post ever (~maybe ever)! 

 Here I will try to write about random stuff when the time allows me to. I hope you enjoy it and find it interesting or not actually. Probably a lot of contradiction will happen here but I will try to be as honest as possible to my present self when writting. I will also share some of my project ideas, and half ways there. 

 Since I don't want to use a database for this so it will be mostlikely hardcoded as json files. I might change it in the future if a heartless bad guy gets access to this humble website. So far, so good (first day only). Furthemore, I would like to inform to you scumbag scraping bot that you not welcome here. Thanks for reading, peace!

title: Banana Post
excerpt: More thoughts and reflections about bananas.
content: Banana is good. I like bananas.
